title: Define v2.3 operator-facing organization surfaces
description: Package the current v2.2 organization, contract, dependency, council, decision, and verification artifacts into operator-facing CLI/runtime surfaces so humans and AI can inspect organizational state without reading raw JSON.
triage_notes: Completed by defining the v2.3 operator-facing command and audit surface in docs/v2.3-operator-surface-definition.md and linking it from the roadmap and release plan.
